data_source: No alpha evaluation data used. Repository/qfa Alpaca integration checked: real OHLCV bars only via AlpacaGateway.get_bars; required point-in-time analyst revision breadth and estimate dispersion are unavailable locally.
sanitized_command_prose: Loaded the configured private Alpaca profile, mapped the key identifier to the API key variable in-process, and inspected qfa/AlpacaGateway capabilities without printing or storing secret values. No backtest using --data-csv, daemon, or order submission was run.

metrics.unavailable_reason: No faithful point-in-time analyst revision/dispersion input; OHLCV-only proxy testing was not treated as valid evidence for this mechanism.

random_windows.reason: Blocked before evaluation because falsifier requires safe point-in-time analyst revision/dispersion data.

costs_slippage.reason: No strategy returns or turnover generated.

orthogonality_status.reason: No evaluated return stream; compact prior artifacts were not needed once data-source falsifier triggered.

warnings: Do not interpret the flat model as a negative economic result; it is a data-source rejection/blocked finding.
OHLCV bars can support momentum or event proxies, but they cannot prove analyst revision breadth or estimate-dispersion drift without external PIT data.
No refinement/direct extension is proposed because the issue is rejected/blocked.
